name: @doid/sidebar-sdk
description: DOID Suite Sidebar SDK - Componente standalone per integrare la sidebar Suite in qualsiasi app DOID

scripts.build: npm run build:sidebar && npm run build:chat
scripts.build:chat: terser src/doid-suite-chat-widget.js -o dist/doid-suite-chat-widget.min.js -c -m --source-map "url='doid-suite-chat-widget.min.js.map'" && mkdir -p ../frontend/public/sdk && cp dist/doid-suite-chat-widget.min.js dist/doid-suite-chat-widget.min.js.map ../frontend/public/sdk/
scripts.build:copy: cp src/doid-sidebar.js dist/doid-sidebar.js && cp src/doid-suite-chat-widget.js dist/doid-suite-chat-widget.js

author: DOID
